home.hero_subtitle: Premium chocolate dates, handcrafted with love in Doha
home.featured_subtitle: Each piece tells a story of tradition and craft
home.story_text: Born from a passion for perfection, La Maison de Gador brings together the finest Medjool dates and artisan Belgian chocolate. Every piece is a celebration of Gulf heritage and French chocolatier tradition.
home.cta_subtitle: Order directly via WhatsApp for the freshest selection

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Where Tradition Meets Artistry
about.origin_text: La Maison de Gador was born from a simple belief: that the world's finest dates deserve to be dressed in the world's finest chocolate. Our name carries a legacy — Gador, a symbol of generosity and warmth in our family's heritage.
about.phoenix_text: Our phoenix emblem represents transformation — the journey of a humble date into a work of art. Rising with wings of gold, it symbolizes the rebirth of tradition through modern craftsmanship.
about.craft_text: Every chocolate date is handcrafted in small batches. We source premium Medjool dates from the finest groves and coat them in single-origin Belgian chocolate, finished with hand-selected nuts, edible gold, and natural flavors.
about.value_quality_text: Only the finest ingredients make it into our kitchen.
about.value_heritage_text: We honor Gulf traditions while pushing creative boundaries.
about.value_craft_text: Every piece is handmade with attention to the smallest detail.
